params.context: m365_copilot fresh HAR — substrate.office.com Chathub WebSocket frames during ACTIVE block window. Prior HAR was post-test (no Chathub WS visible). Test PC must (1) authenticate (Windows Hello PIN — sub-agent earlier reported blocking, user may need manual), (2) open DevTools Network with Preserve log BEFORE prompt submit, (3) capture spans submit + engine block + UI render. Save HAR to results/files/m365_fresh_<id>.har including all WS frames at substrate.office.com Chathub endpoint.
